name: urekhafrontend
description: Root directory of the URekha frontend application, built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. It serves as the gateway for the Astro-AI Astrology platform.

subfolders.name: app
subfolders.description: Next.js App Router directory containing application routes, layouts, and API endpoints.

subfolders.name: components
subfolders.description: Reusable React components organized by category (UI, charts, forms, layout, etc.).

subfolders.name: lib
subfolders.description: Core business logic, API clients, authentication configurations, and shared constants.

subfolders.name: utils
subfolders.description: Helper functions and low-level utilities used across the application.

subfolders.name: hooks
subfolders.description: Custom React hooks for managing stateful logic and side effects.

subfolders.name: store
subfolders.description: Global state management configurations (Redux or Zustand).

subfolders.name: types
subfolders.description: Global TypeScript interface and type definitions.

subfolders.name: scripts
subfolders.description: Maintenance, migration, and automation scripts for the project.

subfolders.name: public
subfolders.description: Static assets including images, fonts, and icons accessible via absolute URLs.

subfiles.name: package.json
subfiles.description: Project manifest and dependency management file.

subfiles.name: next.config.ts
subfiles.description: Next.js framework configuration (images, experimental features, build options).

subfiles.name: tailwind.config.ts
subfiles.description: Tailwind CSS design tokens, themes, and plugin configurations.

subfiles.name: AGENTS.md
subfiles.description: Guiding principles and separation of concerns for AI agents working on this repo.

subfiles.name: CLAUDE.md
subfiles.description: Agent-specific memory and rule persistence for the Claude coding assistant.

subfiles.name: tsconfig.json
subfiles.description: TypeScript compiler settings and path aliases.
